description: 每日精选 3 篇英文素材（arXiv 论文摘要 / 行业新闻 / 写作 tip），含高频术语标注 + 中文 takeaway。学一点、记一点、用一点。

items.title: OA-WAM: Object-Addressable World Action Model
items.en: World Action Models (WAMs) enhance VLA policies by jointly predicting scene evolution and robot actions, but most existing methods represent the predicted world as holistic images or global latents — making it hard for the action decoder to address a specific target object. We propose OA-WAM, which decomposes each frame into N+1 slot states. Each slot maintains a persistent address vector and a time-varying content vector, separating object identity from appearance.

vocab.cn: World Action Model 世界动作模型
整体的；这里指未分解的、混合表示
槽（位）；这里指 object-centric 表示中的一个物体单元
外观；与 identity 对立的概念

items.cn: WAM 比纯 VLA 多了「同时预测下一帧 + 动作」的能力，但 holistic 表示让动作头难以「精确指向某个物体」。OA-WAM 把场景拆成 N+1 个 slot，每个 slot 既有「我是谁」（address）又有「我现在长啥样」（content），把身份与外观解耦。

items.title: Latent Bridge: Feature Delta for Dual-System VLA Inference
items.en: Dual-system VLAs such as GR00T-N1.6 and π0.5 invoke a heavy VLM backbone at every control step, creating a serious latency bottleneck. We observe that VLM features at adjacent steps are highly redundant. Latent Bridge introduces a lightweight delta predictor that estimates the feature change between consecutive steps, allowing the VLM to be invoked only periodically. Across LIBERO, RoboCasa and ALOHA, we cut VLM calls by 50–75% while preserving 95–100% of task success.

vocab.cn: 双系统（VLM 大脑 + 动作头）
增量、差分；希腊字母 Δ

items.cn: VLA 推理瓶颈不是 "算得慢"，而是 "每一步都重新算一遍其实没必要"——这就是 Latent Bridge 的洞察。把昂贵的 VLM 调用从每步必跑改成 "周期性跑"，中间用轻量 delta predictor 预测特征变化。50-75% 的 VLM 调用被省掉，性能几乎不掉。

items.title: Writing Tip: Hedging Words in ML Papers
items.source: Academic English · 模块第 02 节
items.en: ML papers are full of hedging — soft phrases that avoid strong commitment. "We hypothesize that X enables Y" really means "we guessed and tried". "Empirically, X seems to work" means "the experiments worked but we don't fully understand why". When you read, recognize hedging so you don't overestimate claims. When you write, hedge appropriately to avoid being attacked by reviewers — but don't hedge so much that your contribution sounds unimpressive.

vocab.cn: 弱断言、不下死结论的措辞

items.cn: 读 paper：识别 hedging 词（we hypothesize / empirically / it seems）能避免被作者忽悠，把 "我猜的" 当成 "已经证明的"。写 paper：自己也要适度 hedge — 完全不 hedge 会被 reviewer 抓硬伤；hedge 太多 contribution 听起来又虚。中点是 "实验支持的强断言 + 推断性的弱断言 + 真实承认的局限"。
